{{Item
| image = Smarty glasses.png
| id = smarty_glasses
| type = Customizable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Smarty Glasses''' is a non-dyable equipable item that makes your dog look smart.

[[File:Smarty glasses display.png|frameless|606x606px]]
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| [[Dog Sunglasses]] <br>+ Redstone Dust
| [[File:Smarty glasses crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.11.0. It is said to have been modeled after MashXP's glasses.
